item.title: Sensex and Nifty Surge as All Sectors Advance; Small Caps Lead Market Rally
item.description: Indian equity markets witnessed a robust rally on 26 March 2026, with the Sensex and Nifty posting strong gains amid broad-based sectoral advances. The Nifty closed at 23,306.45, up 394.05 points or 1.72%, while the Sensex surged 1,205 points to settle at 75,273.45, reflecting a 1.63% increase. Small caps led the charge, signalling renewed investor appetite for riskier segments, supported by positive global cues and healthy market breadth. Time: Mar 26 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Surges 2.34% Led by Broad-Based Gains and Upgraded Stocks
item.description: The mid-cap segment demonstrated robust performance on 26 Mar 2026, with the BSE MIDCAP 150 index advancing 2.34% on the day and maintaining a steady 1.55% gain over the past five sessions. This rally was supported by broad market participation, sectoral leadership, and notable upgrades in stock ratings, underscoring renewed investor confidence in mid-cap equities. Time: Mar 26 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Surges as Defensive and Cyclical Stocks Show Divergent Trends
item.description: The large-cap segment, as represented by the BSE 100 index, has demonstrated robust performance with a 1.76% gain on the day and a steady 1.23% rise over the past five trading sessions. This upward momentum is underpinned by a strong advance-decline ratio and notable shifts in technical outlooks among heavyweight stocks, reflecting a nuanced interplay between defensive and cyclical sectors. Time: Mar 26 2026 04:00 PM IST

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Surges 2.41% as Breadth Strengthens Amid Sectoral Shifts
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has demonstrated robust performance in recent trading sessions, advancing by 2.41% on the day and gaining 1.14% over the past five days. This rally is underpinned by broad market participation and notable sectoral shifts, signalling renewed investor interest in smaller companies amid a cautiously optimistic market environment. Time: Mar 26 2026 04:00 PM IST
